case_title: YOAV SHARVIT VS. ALAER-90, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARVIT, YOAV AS TO DEFENDANT ALAER-90, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA LOVELL'S GALLERY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
